headline: UPS Faces Mix/Margin Challenges As COVID-19 Skews Shipping Choices
summary: United Parcel Service Inc. (NYSE: UPS) has long planned for the day when business-to-consumer (B2C) traffic would become the truly dominant force in its volume mix. The extraordinary events of the past 60 days may have pulled that day forward faster than anyone could have expected.

summary:
Shares of Roper Technologies (NYSE:ROP) moved higher by 3% after the company reported Q1 results.

Quarterly Results
